title: Agentic AI in DevOps: Boosting Software Automation and Collaboration
authors: Mohammed Akour, Mamdouh Alenezi
publish: 2025 International Conference on Artificial Intelligence Security and Governance (ICAISG)
abstract: This paper explores the transformative impact Agentic Artificial Intelligence (AI) can bring into DevOps, mainly in automation, collaboration, and decision-making. We combine controlled experiments and real deployment in a fintech setting to show that the integration of Agentic AI into CI/CD pipelines drastically reduces deployment times, detects errors better, and encourages multi-disciplinary collaboration. Our results show a 36% reduction in test cycle time and a 65% decrease in rollback frequency. Deployment assurance was rated a high 4.6/5 from developers when using the AI assistant-giving developers' confidence in this assistant. This paper offers practical guidelines and architectural blueprints for organizations intending to implement Agentic AI, followed by discussions on factors of ethical, operational, and technical concern for building explainable and trustworthy AI systems.
title_zh: 在DevOps中使用代理型AI：提升软件自动化与协作效率
abstract_zh: 本文探讨了智能代理型人工智能（Agentic AI）在DevOps领域带来的变革性影响，主要体现在自动化、协作与决策制定方面。我们通过受控实验与金融科技场景中的实际部署相结合的方式，证明将智能代理型AI集成到CI/CD流程中，可显著缩短部署时间、更有效地检测错误，并促进跨学科团队的协作。研究结果显示，测试周期时间减少了36%，回滚频率下降了65%。当使用AI助手时，开发人员对部署保障的评分高达4.6/5，反映出开发者对该助手的高度信任。本文为有意实施智能代理型AI的组织提供了实用指南与架构蓝图，并就构建可解释、可信赖AI系统所涉及的伦理、运营和技术层面的关键问题展开讨论。

title: Empowering Educators Through AI-Assisted Code Generation for Life Skills Education
authors: Patchara Eamcharoen
publish: 2025 7th International Conference on Modern Educational Technology (ICMET)
abstract: This study investigates how AI-assisted code generation can empower educators to rapidly design learning activities without programming expertise. Using ChatGPT, a webbased application was developed and deployed on WordPress to promote life skills awareness through scenario-based quizzes across adolescence, adulthood, and older age. The learning activity encouraged students to reflect on health-related choices and behaviors influencing longevity. Moreover, analysis of student reflections revealed meaningful engagement and reflective learning in life skills-particularly in raising awareness of healthy decision-making, strengthening problem-solving perspectives, and fostering personal responsibility for well-being. The quality of life skills content and the effectiveness of its delivery contributed to high overall student satisfaction. Student feedback indicated strong engagement, usability, and positive learning experiences with the web-based activity. The findings demonstrate that AIassisted code generation can democratize educational innovation, enabling educators to create meaningful, technology-enhanced learning experiences that strengthen life skills for lifelong wellbeing.
title_zh: 通过AI辅助代码生成赋能教育工作者开展生活技能教育
abstract_zh: 本研究探讨了人工智能辅助代码生成如何赋能教育工作者，使其无需编程专业知识即可快速设计学习活动。研究利用ChatGPT开发并部署了一个基于WordPress的网络应用，通过面向青少年、成年期及老年期的情景式测验，促进学生对生活技能的认知。该学习活动鼓励学生反思影响寿命的健康选择与行为。此外，对学生反思内容的分析显示，学生在生活技能方面表现出深刻的参与度和反思性学习，尤其体现在提升对健康决策的认识、强化问题解决视角以及培养对自身福祉的责任感。生活技能内容的质量及其有效传递，显著提升了学生的整体满意度。学生反馈表明，该网络学习活动具有高度的参与性、易用性以及积极的学习体验。研究结果表明，人工智能辅助代码生成能够推动教育创新的普及化，使教育工作者得以创建有意义且技术赋能的学习体验，从而有效增强终身福祉所需的生活技能。

title: AutoSDLC-LC: A Low-Code AI-Driven Framework for Accelerating and Democratizing the Software Development Lifecycle
authors: C Jayamala, Ajathyan N E, Dharanya A G, Lakshitha Viswanathan, Vishnu Priya S, Anees Nachiya K
publish: 2025 International Conference On Emerging Computation and Information Technologies (ICECIT)
abstract: The increasing demand for rapid software development, especially from non-technical stakeholders, has highlighted the need for intelligent automation within the Software Development Lifecycle (SDLC). In this paper, we present AutoSDLC-LC a new low-code, AI-driven, paradigm-shifting software development framework that is radically changing software engineering through its ability to speed up application development with high precision and democratization. Combining the transformer-based Natural Language Processing (T5) to convert a set of requirements into a model, the AutoML to generate the backend model, and the OpenAI Codex to dynamically generate the code, the framework enables users to develop, run, and deploy full-stack applications with little manual programming. AutoSDLC-LC has a drag and drop workflow designer, smart schema-to-component map following meta-learning, and GPT as an aid in test case generation. The framework has a demonstrated 72.6% average time savings on development in ten varied case studies, which spanned inventory management to sales analytics, reached an average code coverage of 90.2%, and an AutoML model accuracy of 94.2%. Also, API binding precision was at 93.8% and defect density at 1.43 KLOC. Such head-to-toe combination serves more than just larger time-to-market by enabling citizen developers and business users to take part in an end-to-end delivery of software. Through the utilization of the low-code accessibility and AI-based intelligence, AutoSDLC-LC virtually eliminates the remains between conceptualization and actualization, leading to an evolutionary solution which is applicable in the current agile space. The results provided confirm its feasible usefulness in easing the effort, upsurge automation and sustaining quality software. The future extensions will be aimed at better explainability, adding natural language debugging, and incorporating federated deployment mechanisms.
title_zh: AutoSDLC-LC：一种低代码的AI驱动框架，用于加速并普及软件开发生命周期
abstract_zh: 日益增长的快速软件开发需求，尤其是来自非技术利益相关者的需求，凸显了在软件开发生命周期（SDLC）中引入智能自动化的重要性。本文提出了一种名为AutoSDLC-LC的新一代低代码、AI驱动的范式变革型软件开发框架，该框架通过其高精度与普及化能力，正在彻底改变软件工程领域，显著加速应用开发进程。AutoSDLC-LC结合基于Transformer的自然语言处理技术（T5），将一组需求转化为模型；利用AutoML生成后端模型；并通过OpenAI Codex动态生成代码，使用户能够以极少的手动编程完成全栈应用的开发、运行与部署。该框架配备拖拽式工作流设计器、基于元学习的智能模式到组件映射功能，以及GPT辅助测试用例生成。在涵盖库存管理到销售分析等十项不同案例研究中，AutoSDLC-LC平均节省开发时间达72.6%，代码覆盖率平均达到90.2%，AutoML模型准确率达94.2%；API绑定精度为93.8%，缺陷密度仅为1.43每千行代码（KLOC）。这一全方位集成不仅大幅缩短了上市时间，更使普通公民开发者和业务用户能够参与软件的端到端交付过程。借助低代码的易用性与AI驱动的智能能力，AutoSDLC-LC几乎消除了从概念构想到实际实现之间的鸿沟，形成一种适用于当前敏捷环境的演进式解决方案。实验结果证实，该框架在降低开发负担、提升自动化水平及保障软件质量方面具有切实可行的价值。未来扩展方向将聚焦于增强可解释性、引入自然语言调试功能，并集成联邦部署机制。

title: The Dual Role of Artificial Intelligence and LLM in Cybersecurity
authors: Leandros Maglaras, Vassilis C. Gerogiannis, Mohamed Amine Ferrag, Alexios Lekidis, Abderrahmane Lakas, Naghmeh Moradpoor
publish: 2025 International Conference on Artificial Intelligence Security and Governance (ICAISG)
abstract: Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Large Language Models (LLMs) are transforming the cybersecurity landscape, taking a dual role as both enablers of defense. This paper explores this duality by distinguishing between AI for Security, where intelligent models enhance threat analysis, intrusion detection, and automated mitigation, and Security for AI, which focuses on securing models themselves against adversarial manipulation, data leakage, and prompt-based exploitation. To empirically evaluate the capabilities of modern LLMs in cybersecurity, we conducted extensive experiments using the newly developed CyberMetric dataset, which assesses cybersecurity knowledge across multiple domains such as cryptography, network defense, and software vulnerabilities. Our evaluation of twenty state-of-the-art LLMs—including GPT-5 Chat, Grok 4 Fast, Qwen3 235B, Gemini 2.5 Flash, and DeepSeek V3.2—demonstrates that the 2025 generation of models achieves near-human performance, with GPT-5 Chat reaching 98.75% accuracy and several open-source models performing within a 2-3% margin. These results highlight the growing maturity of open LLM ecosystems for cybersecurity applications and confirm that modern LLMs are becoming reliable instruments for cyber defense, capable of supporting automated threat analysis, vulnerability assessment, and compliance verification, while also emphasizing the need to ensure their safety, transparency, and resilience against misuse.
title_zh: 人工智能与大语言模型在网络安全中的双重角色
abstract_zh:
人工智能（AI）与大型语言模型（LLMs）正在重塑网络安全领域，扮演着防御赋能的双重角色。本文通过区分“用于安全的AI”（AI for Security）与“为AI提供安全”（Security for AI），深入探讨这一双重性。“用于安全的AI”指利用智能模型提升威胁分析、入侵检测和自动化响应的能力；而“为AI提供安全”则聚焦于防范模型自身遭受对抗性攻击、数据泄露及提示词操纵等风险。

为实证评估现代大语言模型在网络安全领域的实际能力，我们基于新开发的CyberMetric数据集进行了广泛实验。该数据集涵盖密码学、网络防御、软件漏洞等多个网络安全核心领域，全面评估模型的知识水平。我们对二十个前沿大语言模型进行了测试，包括GPT-5 Chat、Grok 4 Fast、Qwen3 235B、Gemini 2.5 Flash以及DeepSeek V3.2等。结果显示，2025年新一代模型已接近人类表现水平：GPT-5 Chat达到98.75%的准确率，多个开源模型亦仅落后2%-3%。这些成果凸显了开源大语言模型生态系统在网络安全应用中的日益成熟，证实现代大语言模型正逐步成为可靠的网络安全工具，能够有效支持自动化威胁分析、漏洞评估与合规性验证。同时，也进一步强调了确保其安全性、透明性以及抵御滥用能力的重要性。

title: Investigating Violations of Coding Standards in Large Language Models
authors: YongBeom Park, HoYong Lim, Jian Kim, Ki-Il Kim
publish: 2025 Global Congress on Emerging Technologies (GCET)
abstract: Automated code review using Large Language Models (LLM) has attracted many researchers’ interests by detecting suspicious codes. However, its another application for ensuring compliance with specific coding standard such as MISRA-C remains unexplored yet. Even though static code analyzers usually are employed for this purpose, they are often too slow to adapt standard revisions and struggle with company-specific rules. To address these limitations, we propose a new LLM framework to investigate violation of coding standard, called LLM-CS to leverage LLMs as a more flexible alternative. The proposed framework consists of two modules, that is, Identifier and Specification module. The former adapts fine-tuned Positive and Unlabeled (PU) learning to filter suspicious methods from source code while the latter is to specify the exact coding rules violated in the suspicious methods identified by the Identifier. Our study uses the PEP8 standard to validate the framework by considering extension to other coding standards as well. By experimental results, LLM-CS demonstrated valid detection and specification of violation for low external dependency.
title_zh: 大型语言模型中编码规范违规行为的调查
abstract_zh: 使用大型语言模型（LLM）进行自动化代码审查已引起众多研究者的关注，因其能够检测可疑代码。然而，其在确保符合特定编码标准（如MISRA-C）方面的另一应用仍鲜有探索。尽管静态代码分析工具通常用于此目的，但它们往往因难以快速适应标准的更新修订，且在处理公司特定规则时存在困难。为解决这些局限性，我们提出一种新的基于LLM的框架——LLM-CS，旨在利用LLM作为更具灵活性的替代方案，以识别编码标准违规行为。该框架包含两个模块：标识模块（Identifier）和规范模块（Specification）。前者采用微调后的正例与未标记（PU）学习方法，从源代码中筛选出可疑函数；后者则用于精确指出由标识模块识别出的可疑函数所违反的具体编码规则。本研究以PEP8标准验证该框架，并考虑未来扩展至其他编码标准的可能性。实验结果表明，LLM-CS在外部依赖较低的情况下，能够有效实现违规行为的检测与具体规则的精准说明。

title: Smarter Silicon: AI-Driven Power, Clock, and Floor planning for Sub-5nm and 3D SoCs
authors: Phaneendra Chainulu Sri Adibhatla, Srikanth Aitha, Uday Ashokbhai Korat
publish: 2025 International Conference on Emerging Technologies and Innovation for Sustainability (EmergIN)
abstract: The inevitable reduction to semiconductor technology to less than 5nm nodes presents extremely challenging issues to power management, clock distribution and floor planning of 3D System-on-Chip (SOC) architectures. The traditional Electronic Design Automation (EDA) tools do not perform very well in the optimization of the multi-dimensional design space which is enormous. In this empirical study, an optimization system has been proposed using DL wherein convolutional neural networks (CNNs) and reinforcement learning (RL) are applied to automatism and optimize power, clock, and floor planning plans. Thermal hotspots, clock tree synthesis optimization, and interconnect delays minimization is predicted by the proposed model using datasets obtained according to the industry-level design benchmarks. The experimental results indicate up to 27 percent power savings, 19 percent clock skew or 22 percent increase in area usage, compared to first-generation heuristic-based EDA tools. The outcomes generate a novel paradigm based on which the employment of AI-boosted design intelligence will reduce physical design closure dramatically and give it reliability in the context of ultra-scaled semiconductor technologies.
title_zh: 更智能的硅片：面向5纳米以下及3D SoC的AI驱动电源、时钟与布局规划
abstract_zh: 随着半导体技术不可避免地发展到5纳米以下节点，三维系统级芯片（3D SoC）架构在功耗管理、时钟分配和布局规划方面面临前所未有的挑战。传统的电子设计自动化（EDA）工具在处理庞大且多维度的设计空间优化时表现不佳。在本项实证研究中，提出了一种基于深度学习（DL）的优化系统，采用卷积神经网络（CNN）与强化学习（RL）技术，实现对功耗、时钟及布局规划方案的自动化与优化。该模型利用行业级设计基准所获取的数据集，能够预测热热点、时钟树综合优化以及互连延迟最小化等关键问题。实验结果表明，相较于第一代基于启发式算法的EDA工具，本方法可实现最高达27%的功耗降低，或19%的时钟偏移改善，或22%的面积使用率提升。研究成果揭示了一种新范式：借助人工智能驱动的设计智能，将显著缩短物理设计收敛时间，并在超微缩半导体技术背景下大幅提升设计可靠性。

title: A Multi-Modal Fusion Approach for Cybersecurity Threat Detection Using the FIT-BERT Model
authors: Sravya Erukulla, Sai Suhas Kandukoori, Pothana Dheeraj Roy Dwivedhi, Basetty Mallikarjuna
publish: 2025 International Conference on Data, Energy and Communication Networks (DECoN)
abstract: Traditional machine learning-based models for detecting cybersecurity threats cannot derive the semantic relations among network traffic and, therefore, have limited precision in sophisticated attacks. This paper introduces the FIT-BERT model. It is a dual-stream fusion architecture for high-precision network intrusion detection. The statistical approach creates a Feature-Interaction Transformer which analyzes numerical flow features in order to identify complex interdependencies in the traffic data. In parallel to that, the semantic flow depends on a pre trained language model DistilBERT for processing autogenerated textual descriptions of the network flow, capturing important contextual insights from the traffic. These numerical and semantic insights are then combined into a single feature vector for final classification. This multimodal method results in significant improvements in the identification of specific, critical threats and attacks. Trained using a complicated Focal Loss function for addressing severe class imbalance, the FIT-BERT model shows a specialized capability for high precision threat detection and has significant capability to help with alert fatigue in highly advanced Security Operations Centers.
title_zh: 基于FIT-BERT模型的多模态融合网络安全威胁检测方法
abstract_zh: 基于传统机器学习的网络安全威胁检测模型无法捕捉网络流量之间的语义关系，因此在应对复杂攻击时精度有限。本文提出FIT-BERT模型，这是一种双流融合架构，旨在实现高精度的网络入侵检测。该模型采用统计方法构建了一个特征交互Transformer（Feature-Interaction Transformer），用于分析流量中的数值型特征，以识别流量数据中复杂的相互依赖关系。与此同时，语义流则利用预训练的语言模型DistilBERT，对自动生成的网络流量文本描述进行处理，从而从流量中提取关键的上下文信息。随后，将数值特征与语义特征所获得的洞察融合为单一特征向量，用于最终分类。这种多模态方法显著提升了对特定关键威胁和攻击的识别能力。通过采用复杂的焦点损失函数（Focal Loss）进行训练，以缓解严重的类别不平衡问题，FIT-BERT模型展现出卓越的高精度威胁检测能力，能够有效缓解高级安全运营中心中的告警疲劳问题。

title: Ψ-xLSTM: Automated Behavioral Verilog-A Generation from Distilled Physics-Informed xLSTM Networks for High-Frequency Device Modeling
authors: Sorin Liviu Jurj
publish: IEEE Access
abstract: Physics-Informed Neural Networks (PINNs) have emerged as a powerful tool for device modeling, yet they suffer from a fundamental spectral bias, often failing to capture high-frequency transient dynamics essential for modern circuit simulation. While recent implementations of Extended Long Short-Term Memory (xLSTM) networks have successfully mitigated this bias by leveraging exponential gating and matrix memories, they introduce prohibitive computational complexity O(N2) that renders them unsuitable for standard compact modeling and hardware deployment. In this work, we introduce Ψ-xLSTM, a framework that extends the Ψ-HDL methodology to recurrent architectures, enabling the automatic generation of efficient behavioral Verilog-A models that retain the high-frequency fidelity of xLSTMs. We propose a novel Recurrent Relation-Aware Distillation (RRAD) strategy that preserves temporal dynamics and targets the specific architectural innovations of xLSTM. First, we demonstrate that the xLSTM exponential gating mechanisms can be clustered to reveal discrete, physically interpretable time constants (relaxation times), replacing continuous gate values with sparse, physics-based parameters. Second, we apply structural compression to the xLSTM matrix memory (mLSTM), proving that the governing physics of device dynamics resides in a low-rank subspace, allowing the dense matrix to be collapsed into a few dominant eigen-modes. We validate Ψ-xLSTM on high-frequency transient memristor dynamics, where the framework achieves the spectral accuracy of full xLSTM-PINNs while reducing parameter count by up to 84%. Extended evaluation across additional spectral-bias baselines, multiple device classes, small-signal and large-signal active-device benchmarks, and publicly available experimental datasets further demonstrates the robustness and broader applicability of the approach. SPICE circuit simulation validates the complete model generation pipeline with a mean absolute error of 0.40 mA, confirming quantitative accuracy. The resulting models are automatically exported as compact behavioral Verilog-A code that captures high-frequency harmonics missed by standard PINNs, while simulating 7.6× faster in Python, with substantial additional gains expected in compiled SPICE due to elimination of matrix-memory overhead, supported by complexity analysis and behavioral simulation validation.
title_zh: Ψ-xLSTM：从提炼的物理信息xLSTM网络自动生成高频器件建模用行为级Verilog-A代码
abstract_zh: 物理信息神经网络（PINNs）已成为器件建模的强大工具，但其存在固有的谱偏差问题，往往无法捕捉现代电路仿真中至关重要的高频瞬态动态。尽管近期采用扩展长短期记忆（xLSTM）网络的实现通过引入指数门控机制和矩阵记忆，在一定程度上缓解了这一偏差，但其带来了极高的计算复杂度 $ O(N^2) $，使得该方法难以应用于标准紧凑建模及硬件部署。本文提出 Ψ-xLSTM 框架，将 Ψ-HDL 方法拓展至递归架构，实现了高效行为级 Verilog-A 模型的自动生成，同时保留了 xLSTM 的高频保真度。我们提出一种新型的**递归关系感知蒸馏**（Recurrent Relation-Aware Distillation, RRAD）策略，以有效保留时间动态特性，并针对 xLSTM 的特定结构创新进行优化。首先，我们证明 xLSTM 中的指数门控机制可通过聚类揭示出离散且具有物理解释意义的时间常数（弛豫时间），从而用稀疏的、基于物理的参数替代连续的门控值；其次，我们对 xLSTM 的矩阵记忆（mLSTM）实施结构压缩，证明器件动态的控制物理规律存在于低秩子空间中，因此可将密集矩阵压缩为少数主导特征模式。我们在高频瞬态忆阻器动态系统上验证了 Ψ-xLSTM 框架，结果表明该方法在保持与完整 xLSTM-PINN 相当的频谱精度的同时，参数量减少高达 84%。进一步在多种谱偏差基线模型、多类器件、小信号与大信号有源器件基准测试以及公开可用的实验数据集上的扩展评估，充分展示了该方法的鲁棒性与广泛适用性。SPICE 电路仿真验证了完整的模型生成流程，平均绝对误差仅为 0.40 mA，证实了其定量准确性。最终生成的模型可自动导出为紧凑的行为级 Verilog-A 代码，能够捕捉传统 PINNs 所遗漏的高频谐波成分；在 Python 环境下仿真速度提升达 7.6 倍，而由于消除了矩阵记忆开销，在编译后的 SPICE 环境中预计还将获得更显著的性能增益，相关结论得到了复杂度分析与行为仿真验证的支持。

title: HyPSI: A Hybrid Protocol Semantic Inference Framework for Industrial Control Systems
authors: Yuxiang Lei, Xuejun Zong, Kan He, Lian Lian, Yifei Sun, Plamen Vasilev, Bowei Ning
publish: IEEE Access
abstract: The convergence of Operational Technology (OT) and Information Technology (IT) exposes legacy Industrial Control Systems (ICS) devices to distinct protocol-level attacks due to the lack of semantic filtering mechanisms in modern edge gateways. However, effective security monitoring is hindered by the prevalence of proprietary, undocumented protocol implementations that create a semantic gap. Existing solutions struggle to generalize across vendor-specific implementations due to severe distribution shifts in protocol encoding and the prohibitive cost of manual annotation. To bridge this gap, this paper proposes HyPSI (Hybrid Protocol Semantic Inference), a framework that reformulates semantic inference not merely as a classification task, but as a domain adaptation problem. Operating on a knowledge-guided weakly supervised paradigm, HyPSI utilizes a Knowledge-Guided Semantic Mapper to transform constant-cost expert heuristics into high-confidence pseudo-labels, effectively addressing the initialization challenge with-out large-scale labeled data. Subsequently, to overcome the barrier of protocol heterogeneity, we introduce a Domain-Adaptive Contrastive Learning mechanism. This approach explicitly aligns the representation spaces of diverse protocols, extracting domain-invariant structural features that persist across proprietary variants. Experimental results on a high-fidelity Hardware-in-the-Loop (HIL) testbed demonstrate that HyPSI achieves an average inference accuracy of 88.4%. Crucially, the framework proves its practical utility in downstream security tasks: HyPSI-guided fuzzing significantly improves firmware code coverage compared to blind approaches, validating its effectiveness in automating vulnerability discovery for legacy industrial assets.
title_zh: HyPSI：一种用于工业控制系统的混合协议语义推理框架
abstract_zh: 运营技术（OT）与信息技术（IT）的融合，使传统工业控制系统（ICS）设备暴露于特定协议层的攻击之下，原因在于现代边缘网关缺乏语义过滤机制。然而，由于存在大量专有且未公开的协议实现，有效安全监控面临挑战，从而形成了显著的语义鸿沟。现有解决方案难以在不同厂商的实现之间实现泛化，主要受限于协议编码上的严重分布偏移，以及人工标注带来的高昂成本。为弥合这一差距，本文提出HyPSI（混合协议语义推断）框架，将语义推断重新定义为一个领域自适应问题，而不仅仅是一个分类任务。该框架基于知识引导的弱监督范式，利用知识引导的语义映射器，将固定成本的专家启发式规则转化为高置信度的伪标签，从而在无需大规模标注数据的情况下有效解决初始化难题。为进一步克服协议异构性带来的障碍，我们引入了领域自适应对比学习机制，该方法显式对齐多种协议的表示空间，提取出跨专有变体保持不变的结构特征。在高保真硬件在环（HIL）测试平台上的实验结果表明，HyPSI实现了平均88.4%的推断准确率。尤为重要的是，该框架在下游安全任务中展现出实际应用价值：基于HyPSI指导的模糊测试相比盲测方法显著提升了固件代码覆盖率，验证了其在自动化发现老旧工业资产漏洞方面的有效性。

title: Prompt Recovery from Source Code: A Comparative Study of Large Language Models
authors: Avishek Mukherjee
publish: IEEE Access
abstract: This paper presents a rigorous empirical study on prompt recovery, the task of inferring the original natural language instruction from a given source code snippet. We evaluate four state-of-the-art Large Language Models (LLMs): OpenAI’s GPT model, Google’s Gemini, Meta’s Llama3, and DeepSeek’s DeepSeek-R1 on their ability to recover prompts from Python code. The analysis also investigates the impact of code degradation (via variable renaming and comment removal), which serves as a proxy for poorly documented legacy systems. Additionally a preliminary study of generative sampling temperature effects was conducted using OpenAI’s GPT model. We evaluate performance using a comprehensive suite of metrics, including BLEU, ROUGE, BERTScore, and Levenshtein Distance. Our findings reveal that while code cleaning degrades lexical similarity scores (e.g., average BLEU scores for OpenAI are 20% lower), it consistently maintains semantic similarity (e.g., average BERT-F1 remains above 0.90). This suggests that in the absence of lexical cues, models are forced to rely on deeper algorithmic reasoning and structural understanding of source code. Comparative analysis shows cloud-hosted models exhibit superior semantic fidelity, while DeepSeek-R1 demonstrates competitive character-level accuracy. These results provide critical insights into the code comprehension capabilities of modern LLMs and have significant implications for their application in reverse engineering, legacy system documentation, and the development of more robust evaluation benchmarks for code intelligence.
title_zh: 从源代码中恢复提示：大型语言模型的比较研究
abstract_zh: 本文对提示恢复（prompt recovery）任务进行了严谨的实证研究，该任务旨在从给定的源代码片段中推断出原始的自然语言指令。我们评估了四种最先进的大型语言模型（LLMs）——OpenAI的GPT模型、Google的Gemini、Meta的Llama3以及DeepSeek的DeepSeek-R1——在从Python代码中恢复提示方面的能力。研究还探讨了代码退化（通过变量重命名和注释删除实现）的影响，这可作为文档不全的遗留系统的一种代理。此外，我们还使用OpenAI的GPT模型初步考察了生成采样温度的影响。性能评估采用了一套全面的指标，包括BLEU、ROUGE、BERTScore和Levenshtein距离。研究结果表明，尽管代码清理会降低词汇相似性得分（例如，OpenAI模型的平均BLEU分数下降20%），但其语义相似性始终保持稳定（例如，平均BERT-F1得分维持在0.90以上）。这一发现表明，在缺乏词汇线索的情况下，模型被迫依赖更深层次的算法推理与代码结构理解能力。对比分析显示，云端托管模型在语义保真度方面表现更优，而DeepSeek-R1则展现出具有竞争力的字符级准确性。这些结果为现代大语言模型的代码理解能力提供了关键洞见，并对反向工程、遗留系统文档化以及构建更稳健的代码智能评估基准具有重要意义。

title: Adaptive Malware Defense: A Multi-Agent System for Malware Detection and Adaptive Response
authors: Rahul Katara, Mary Mekala A
publish: 2026 International Conference on Computing, Communication, Control and Cyber-Physical Systems (I5CPS)
abstract: Malware remains a persistent threat to governments, corporations, and individuals, with conventional signature-based detection methods proving inadequate against polymorphic, fileless, and adversarially designed threats. This paper presents Adaptive Malware Defense (AMD), a multi-agent system integrating static analysis, dynamic sandboxing, threat intelligence enrichment, explainable machine learning, and Large Language Model (LLM)-based reasoning for comprehensive malware detection. The system achieves 94.5% accuracy using Logistic Regression with SHAP(SHapley Additive exPlanations)based interpretability, with advanced models reaching 97.2% accuracy. External threat intelligence from VirusTotal, AbuseIPDB, and the National Vulnerability Database enriches detection context. The complete analysis pipeline executes in an average of 9.07 seconds, demonstrating practical feasibility for Security Operations Center workflows. Adversarial robustness testing reveals resilience under obfuscation, with transformer-based models maintaining 92.5% accuracy. A Streamlit-based prototype validates operational utility through interactive dashboards, automated reporting, and analyst-friendly interfaces. By unifying detection mechanisms with explainable AI and LLM-based contextual reasoning, AMD bridges the gap between detection and actionable defense.
title_zh: 自适应恶意软件防御：一种用于恶意软件检测与自适应响应的多智能体系统
abstract_zh: 恶意软件对政府、企业和个人持续构成威胁，传统的基于特征码的检测方法在面对多态性、无文件及对抗性设计的恶意软件时已显不足。本文提出自适应恶意软件防御系统（Adaptive Malware Defense, AMD），该系统是一个多智能体架构，集成了静态分析、动态沙箱、威胁情报增强、可解释机器学习以及基于大语言模型（LLM）的推理能力，实现全面的恶意软件检测。系统采用逻辑回归结合SHAP（SHapley Additive exPlanations）可解释性方法，达到94.5%的准确率，而先进模型的准确率更高达97.2%。通过整合VirusTotal、AbuseIPDB以及国家漏洞数据库等外部威胁情报，显著丰富了检测上下文信息。整个分析流程平均耗时仅9.07秒，充分证明其在安全运营中心（SOC）工作流中的实际可行性。对抗鲁棒性测试表明，即使在代码混淆攻击下，基于Transformer的模型仍能保持92.5%的检测准确率。基于Streamlit的原型系统通过交互式仪表盘、自动化报告和面向分析师的友好界面，验证了系统的实际应用价值。AMD通过融合多种检测机制与可解释人工智能及LLM驱动的上下文推理，有效弥合了检测与可操作防御之间的鸿沟。

title: Learning and Debugging Assistant for Python with Retrieval Augmented Generation Capabilities
authors: Kathiroli R, Logarathan S V, Akash S, Santhiya K
publish: 2026 International Conference on Computing, Communication, Control and Cyber-Physical Systems (I5CPS)
abstract: Large Language Models(LLMs) often lack domain-specific grounding and may produce generic, hallucinated, or context-insensitive responses, despite their remarkable capability in assisting programming tasks. Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems aim to address these limitations by incorporating external knowledge sources; however, many existing implementations remain passive responders with limited interactivity and pedagogical depth. This work presents the Rubber Duck Assistant, a RAG-powered python learning and debugging system that combines interactive dialog, metacognitive learning, semantic retrieval via ChromaDB, and real-time code execution. Inspired by the Rubber Duck Debugging approach, the assistant guides students to articulate and reflect on their code through precise explanations, bug identification, and correction strategies. Key contributions include a hybrid keyword-based LLM query classifier, format-aware chunk embedding, and a dedicated Debug Sandbox for safe code exploration. The Evaluation results demonstrate the effectiveness of the assistant, achieving 92% accuracy and a 91% F1 score in Python query classification. By fostering deeper learning and independent debugging skills, this study highlights how interactive and grounded artificial intelligence tutors can enhance programming education.
title_zh: Python学习与调试助手（具备检索增强生成能力）
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）尽管在辅助编程任务方面表现出色，但往往缺乏特定领域的知识基础，容易生成泛化、虚构或与上下文无关的回应。检索增强生成（RAG）系统旨在通过引入外部知识源来解决这些问题，然而，许多现有实现仍停留在被动响应状态，互动性不足且教学深度有限。本文提出了一种名为“橡皮鸭助手”（Rubber Duck Assistant）的基于RAG的Python学习与调试系统，该系统融合了交互式对话、元认知学习、基于ChromaDB的语义检索以及实时代码执行功能。受“橡皮鸭调试法”的启发，该助手引导学生通过精准解释、错误识别和修正策略，主动阐述并反思自己的代码。主要贡献包括：一种混合关键词-基于LLM的查询分类器、格式感知的文本块嵌入方法，以及一个专为安全代码探索设计的“调试沙箱”。评估结果表明，该助手在Python查询分类任务中达到了92%的准确率和91%的F1分数。通过促进更深层次的学习和独立调试能力的发展，本研究展示了交互式且具备领域知识支撑的人工智能导师如何有效提升编程教育质量。

title: KDG-Rec: Enhanced Dual-GNN Programming Exercise Recommendation via LLM-Powered Knowledge Annotation and Preference-Decoupling
authors: Bangqi Li, Qing Sun, Tianyi Zhu, Ji Wu, Li Jing, Wenge Rong
publish: IEEE Transactions on Computational Social Systems
abstract: The rapid expansion of online programming exercise platforms has brought abundant learning resources for programming education, but also presents challenges for personalized exercise recommendation due to missing or imprecise knowledge annotations and the sparsity of learner-exercise interaction records, which together lead to reduced accuracy and a lack of explainability in the recommendation results. Existing natural language processing and large language models (LLM)-based annotation methods struggle to capture implicit knowledge and often generate redundant or inconsistent results. Moreover, mainstream recommendation systems are ineffective at handling the severe sparsity of interaction sequences in programming exercise datasets, and typically model student preferences in a single dimension—overlooking key educational factors such as knowledge gaps, difficulty tolerance, and preferred learning rhythm. To address these challenges, we propose KDG-Rec, a novel framework that first introduces AgentCo-KAS, a multiagent LLM-based collaborative annotation method with role-specific fine-tuning and cross-agent verification for high-precision, fine-grained knowledge annotation. Building on these enriched annotations, we develop a disentangled graph neural network model that constructs dual exercise-interaction graphs to effectively capture learning patterns at multiple granularities in interaction sequences and explicitly decouples student preferences into four interpretable dimensions for adaptive fusion. Extensive experiments on real-world datasets demonstrate that KDG-Rec outperforms nine state-of-the-art methods across multiple metrics, significantly advancing personalized programming exercise recommendation.
title_zh: KDG-Rec：基于大语言模型知识标注与偏好解耦的增强型双图神经网络编程练习推荐
abstract_zh: 在线编程练习平台的迅速扩展为编程教育带来了丰富的学习资源，但也因知识标注缺失或不准确、学习者与练习之间的交互记录稀疏等问题，给个性化练习推荐带来了挑战，导致推荐结果的准确性下降且缺乏可解释性。现有的基于自然语言处理和大语言模型（LLM）的标注方法难以捕捉隐含知识，常产生冗余或不一致的结果。此外，主流推荐系统在处理编程练习数据集中严重的交互序列稀疏性方面表现不佳，通常仅以单一维度建模学生偏好，忽略了知识盲点、难度容忍度和偏好的学习节奏等关键教育因素。为应对这些挑战，我们提出KDG-Rec，一种新型框架。该框架首先引入AgentCo-KAS——一种基于多智能体的LLM协同标注方法，通过角色特异性微调和跨智能体验证，实现高精度、细粒度的知识标注。在此丰富标注的基础上，我们构建了一种解耦的图神经网络模型，通过建立双重练习-交互图，有效捕捉交互序列中多层次的学习模式，并将学生偏好显式解耦为四个可解释的维度，实现自适应融合。在真实数据集上的大量实验表明，KDG-Rec在多个指标上均优于九种最先进的方法，显著推动了个性化编程练习推荐的发展。

title: Enhanced Clustering of Large Language Model-Generated Tasks: A Hybrid Approach Using UMAP, DBSCAN, and KMeans and XAI
authors: T Satyanarayana Murty Poppoppula, Venkatesan M Sundaram, Kiran Sree P, Prabhavathy P
publish: 2026 International Conference on Computing, Communication, Control and Cyber-Physical Systems (I5CPS)
abstract: Categorization of tasks produced by Large Language Models (LLMs) is necessary to interpret their practical uses. Conventional clusterization with BERTopic and BERT embeddings is restricted due to the inferior separation of clusters and interpretability of topics. This paper presents a better approach to clustering utilizing hybrid embeddings (BAAI/bge-large-en), dimensional reduction (UMAP), and clustering algorithms (DBSCAN and KMeans). Our approach sorts 5,316 tasks into 300 substantive clusters, bettering interpretability and performance indicators. In contrast to existing models, our method obtains higher topic coherence, improved separation, and better clustering quality.
title_zh: 大语言模型生成任务的增强聚类：一种结合UMAP、DBSCAN、KMeans与可解释人工智能（XAI）的混合方法
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）生成的任务分类对于理解其实际应用至关重要。传统的基于BERTopic和BERT嵌入的聚类方法受限于聚类分离效果较差以及主题可解释性不足。本文提出一种更优的聚类方法，结合混合嵌入（BAAI/bge-large-en）、降维技术（UMAP）以及聚类算法（DBSCAN与KMeans）。该方法将5,316个任务有效归类为300个具有实质意义的聚类，显著提升了主题的可解释性与性能指标。相较于现有模型，本方法在主题一致性、聚类分离度及整体聚类质量方面均表现更优。

title: Copiloting the Copilots for Automated Program Repair
authors: Yuxiang Wei, Chunqiu Steven Xia, Lingming Zhang
publish: Communications of the ACM
abstract: None
title_zh: 协作驾驶自动化程序修复的协作者
abstract_zh: None

title: Machine Learning for Web Vulnerability Detection
authors: Ashish Dibouliya, Varsha Jotwani, Anand Kumar Gupta
publish: 2025 International Conference on Emerging Technologies and Innovation for Sustainability (EmergIN)
abstract: The increasing growth of online applications has heightened the importance of proactive vulnerability assessment in protecting sensitive data and ensuring system stability. This study describes the creation of an AI-assisted vulnerability scanner that combines standard security testing with machine learning-based risk prediction. The primary goal of this effort is to create a user-friendly framework that can detect common web vulnerabilities—specifically SQL Injection, Cross-Site Scripting (XSS), and unsafe HTTP configurations—while also offering an intelligent risk assessment to assist security decisions. Unlike traditional scanners, which just enumerate vulnerabilities, the proposed solution uses a lightweight neural network to forecast overall threat severity based on identified patterns, improving interpretability and priority. The scanner further improves usability by featuring a graphical interface, automated report generation, and data visualization through multiple charts. This novel integration of real-time vulnerability detection, risk prediction, and visualization offers a practical and extensible solution for researchers and practitioners seeking to evaluate and strengthen web application security.
title_zh: 用于Web漏洞检测的机器学习
abstract_zh: 随着在线应用的不断增长，主动进行漏洞评估的重要性日益凸显，这对于保护敏感数据和确保系统稳定性至关重要。本研究描述了一种结合标准安全测试与基于机器学习的风险预测的AI辅助漏洞扫描器的开发过程。该研究的主要目标是构建一个用户友好的框架，能够检测常见的Web漏洞——特别是SQL注入、跨站脚本（XSS）以及不安全的HTTP配置——同时提供智能风险评估，以辅助安全决策。与传统扫描器仅列出漏洞不同，本方案采用轻量级神经网络，根据识别出的模式预测整体威胁严重程度，从而提升结果的可解释性与优先级判断能力。此外，该扫描器通过图形化界面、自动生成报告以及多种图表形式的数据可视化功能，进一步提升了易用性。这种将实时漏洞检测、风险预测与可视化相结合的创新集成，为研究人员和实践者提供了一种实用且可扩展的解决方案，有助于评估并增强Web应用的安全性。

title: Generative AI for Self-Healing Selenium Tests: Comparative Evaluation of Multiple Open-Source LLMs and Rule-Based Methods
authors: Chaithra B C, Chandan B Ram, Swathi Papanna Gari
publish: 2025 International Conference On Emerging Computation and Information Technologies (ICECIT)
abstract: Selenium-based automated web testing becomes brittle because even small modifications to web page elements and their corresponding locators result in repeated test breakdowns which need prolonged upkeep. Web applications face limitations in their self-healing capabilities because traditional rule-based strategies fail to adapt to changes in application structure. The research assesses five open-source Large Language Models (LLMs) which include Zephyr, Mistral, Falcon, LLaMA and Gemma to perform self-healing operations on Selenium tests through generative AI while evaluating their performance against rule-based heuristics. The method works for all web operations beyond login verification and produces better results in repair operations than other methods. It produced better results than rule-based heuristics and smaller LLMs because Gemma achieved 53.3% and LLaMA achieved 46.7% success rates. The research evaluates system performance through its assessment of execution time and system resource consumption to demonstrate its suitability for CI/CD operations. It demonstrates how LLMs can decrease maintenance expenses while enhancing testing precision through their upcoming development stages which will concentrate on prompt optimization and domain-specific fine-tuning and industrial-scale deployment.
title_zh: 用于自愈硒测试的生成式人工智能：多种开源大语言模型与基于规则方法的对比评估
abstract_zh: 基于 Selenium 的自动化网页测试容易变得脆弱，因为网页元素及其对应定位器的微小改动就会导致测试反复失败，需要长时间维护。由于传统基于规则的策略无法适应应用结构的变化，Web 应用在自我修复能力方面存在局限性。本研究评估了五种开源大型语言模型（LLMs），包括 Zephyr、Mistral、Falcon、LLaMA 和 Gemma，通过生成式 AI 执行 Selenium 测试的自我修复操作，并将其性能与基于规则的启发式方法进行对比。该方法适用于登录验证以外的所有网页操作，在修复效果上优于其他方法。其中，Gemma 达到了 53.3% 的成功率，LLaMA 达到 46.7%，均优于基于规则的启发式方法和较小的 LLM。研究通过评估执行时间和系统资源消耗来衡量系统性能，以证明其适用于 CI/CD 环境。结果表明，LLM 可在未来的开发阶段通过提示优化、领域特定微调以及工业级部署，有效降低维护成本并提升测试精度。

title: Validation of Design Rule Checks using SKILL Automation
authors: Aman Kumar, Bhanu Pratap
publish: 2025 International Conference on Emerging Technologies and Innovation for Sustainability (EmergIN)
abstract: In the field of VLSI design, verifying layout compliance with foundry-specific design rules is essential to ensure manufacturability and performance. Manual validation of Design Rule Checks (DRC), however, can be tedious and error-prone, especially as technology nodes evolve. This paper presents a SKILL-based automation approach for validating DRC rules within a commercial EDA environment. Using the SKILL programming language, the proposed method enables efficient generation of layout testcases that verify both valid and invalid design scenarios for each rule. This automated flow significantly reduces manual effort, ensures consistency, and enhances the accuracy of rule implementation. The methodology is particularly effective in handling frequent rule updates by enabling quick regeneration and validation of testcases. Experimental results demonstrate substantial improvements in validation time and coverage, making the approach suitable for scalable and repeatable DRC verification workflows in modern semiconductor processes.
title_zh: 使用SKILL自动化进行设计规则检查的验证
abstract_zh: 在VLSI设计领域，验证版图是否符合特定代工厂的设计规则对于确保可制造性和性能至关重要。然而，手动执行设计规则检查（DRC）往往繁琐且容易出错，尤其是在技术节点不断演进的背景下。本文提出了一种基于SKILL语言的自动化方法，用于在商用EDA环境中验证DRC规则。通过使用SKILL编程语言，该方法能够高效生成用于验证每条规则有效与无效设计场景的版图测试用例。这一自动化流程显著减少了人工工作量，保证了验证的一致性，并提升了规则实现的准确性。该方法在应对频繁更新的设计规则时尤为有效，能够快速重新生成并验证测试用例。实验结果表明，该方法在验证时间与覆盖率方面均取得了显著提升，使其适用于现代半导体工艺中可扩展、可重复的DRC验证工作流。

title: DeepFWI: Identifying Bug-Sensitive Warnings with Multi-Modal Code-Warning Semantics
authors: Han Liu, Jian Zhang, Cen Zhang, Xiaohan Zhang, Kaixuan Li, Sen Chen, Shang-Wei Lin, Yixiang Chen, Xinghua Li, Yang Liu
publish: IEEE Transactions on Software Engineering
abstract: Static analysis tools have evolved over time to assist in detecting bugs. However, the excessive false warnings can impede developers’ productivity and confidence in the tools. Previous research efforts have explored learning-based approaches to identify bug warnings. Nevertheless, their coarse granularity, focusing on either long-term warnings or function-level alerts, are insensitive to individual bugs. Also, they rely on manually crafted features or solely on source code semantics, which is inadequate for effective learning. In this paper, we propose DeepFWI, a learning-based approach that identifies bug-sensitive warnings at a fine-grained granularity. Specifically, we design a novel LSTM-based model that captures multi-modal semantics of source code and warnings from automated static analysis tools (ASATs) and highlights their correlations with cross-attention. To tackle the data scarcity of training and evaluation, we collected a large-scale dataset of 280,273 warnings. We conducted extensive experiments on the dataset to evaluate DeepFWI. The experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach, with an F1-score 67.06% for confirming true warnings in a finer-grained manner, significantly outperforming all baselines. Additionally, to validate the practicality of DeepFWI from the perspective of developers, we applied DeepFWI to four popular open-source projects. Our approach filtered out the vast majority of warnings, while still successfully surfacing 25 true bug-related warnings that were confirmed through manual analysis.
title_zh: DeepFWI：基于多模态代码-警告语义的漏洞敏感警告识别
abstract_zh: 静态分析工具随着时间的推移不断发展，以帮助检测软件中的缺陷。然而，过多的误报会降低开发人员的工作效率，并削弱他们对这些工具的信任。以往的研究尝试采用基于学习的方法来识别错误警告，但这些方法通常粒度较粗，要么关注长期存在的警告，要么仅在函数级别发出警报，难以精准定位具体缺陷。此外，它们依赖于人工设计的特征或仅基于源代码语义，这在实际学习过程中效果有限。本文提出了一种名为 DeepFWI 的基于学习的方法，能够在细粒度层面识别与缺陷相关的警告。具体而言，我们设计了一种新颖的基于 LSTM 的模型，能够捕捉来自自动化静态分析工具（ASATs）的源代码和警告信息的多模态语义，并通过交叉注意力机制突出二者之间的关联性。为应对训练与评估数据稀缺的问题，我们收集了一个包含 280,273 条警告的大规模数据集。我们在该数据集上进行了大量实验以评估 DeepFWI 的性能。实验结果表明，本方法具有显著优势：在更细粒度的层面上确认真实警告时，F1 得分为 67.06%，明显优于所有基线方法。此外，为了从开发者的实际使用角度验证 DeepFWI 的可行性，我们将该方法应用于四个流行的开源项目。结果显示，DeepFWI 成功过滤掉了绝大多数警告，同时仍有效揭示了 25 个经人工分析确认的真实缺陷相关警告。

title: A Comprehensive Study and Implementation of Agentic AI via MCP Servers
authors: Nitin Kumar, Vikas Sagar, Garima Jain
publish: 2025 International Conference on Emerging Technologies and Innovation for Sustainability (EmergIN)
abstract: Agentic and Multi-Agent Artificial Intelligence (AI) systems are revolutionizing business operations and collaborative decision-making. The convergence of Agentic Artificial Intelligence (Agentic AI) and Multi-Agent Systems (MAS) into enterprise ecosystems marks a paradigm shift to autonomous, adaptive, and context-aware decision-making. A structured approach is taken, classifying the literature into five themes: agentic architectures, multi-agent coordination, ethical governance, tool ecosystems, and enterprise case studies. Comparative analysis picks up improvements like layered agentic frameworks and real-time anomaly detection, as well as revealing substantial deficits in scalability, explainability, persistent learning, and multi-agent orchestration. Standardized evaluation benchmarks, interoperable toolchains, ethical governance models, and hybrid human-agent collaboration frameworks need to be developed through future research. The research concludes that the shift from conceptual innovation to enterprise-level deployment is a multidisciplinary exercise that synergizes AI research, systems engineering, and organizational change management. This review has been designed to steer researchers and practitioners alike to convert Agentic AI into an actionable force for sustainable digital transformation in enterprise settings. Additionally, we introduce a multi-location MCP(Model Context Protocol) Server implementation comprising three servers: (1) a Web/API server, (2) a data source server hosting Text-to-SQL and RAG tools, and (3) a secondary data source server with identical tools, all operating in distributed locations. The MCP servers are critical for aggregating and managing data from heterogeneous sources, enabling seamless integration with Large Language Models (LLMs) for real-time query resolution and reasoning.
title_zh: 基于MCP服务器的代理型人工智能综合研究与实现
abstract_zh: 代理型与多智能体人工智能（AI）系统正在彻底改变企业运营和协作决策方式。代理型人工智能（Agentic AI）与多智能体系统（MAS）的融合进入企业生态系统，标志着一种向自主、自适应及情境感知决策的新范式转变。本文采用结构化方法，将现有文献划分为五个主题：代理架构、多智能体协调、伦理治理、工具生态体系以及企业案例研究。通过对比分析，揭示了分层代理框架、实时异常检测等技术进步，同时也暴露出在可扩展性、可解释性、持续学习能力以及多智能体编排方面存在的显著短板。未来的研究亟需建立标准化的评估基准、可互操作的工具链、健全的伦理治理模型，以及人机协同的混合协作框架。研究结论指出，从概念创新到企业级部署的转型是一项跨学科任务，需要整合人工智能研究、系统工程与组织变革管理的协同推进。本综述旨在为研究人员与实践者提供指引，推动代理型AI在企业环境中转化为可持续数字化转型的实际驱动力。此外，本文还提出了一种多地点MCP（模型上下文协议）服务器的实现方案，包含三个分布式运行的服务器：（1）Web/API服务器；（2）数据源服务器，托管文本转SQL与检索增强生成（RAG）工具；（3）配备相同工具的第二数据源服务器。这些MCP服务器在异构数据源的聚合与管理中发挥关键作用，支持与大型语言模型（LLMs）的无缝集成，实现实时查询解析与推理能力。

title: Retrieval-Augmented Generation with Global and Local Graph Association
authors: Qi Wang, Dongan Wang, Weisheng Wang
publish: 2025 7th International Communication Engineering and Cloud Computing Conference (CECCC)
abstract: Retrieval Enhancement Generation (RAG) effectively alleviates the knowledge limitations and “illusion” problems of large language models (LLMs) by retrieving information from external knowledge bases. However, the current performance bottleneck of the RAG system mainly lies in its retrieval module. Traditional retrieval such as DPR rely on dense vector similarity calculations, which often leads them to retrieve semantically relevant but inaccurate or incomplete contexts when dealing with queries that require multi-step reasoning or understanding complex relationships between entities. To solve this core problem, this paper proposes a novel graph association retrieval device and constructs an enhanced framework named GL-GraphRAG. This retrieval tool first conducts a preliminary candidate entity recall using the global knowledge graph, then dynamically constructs a local association graph for specific queries, and precisely reorders the knowledge paths by using the query-aware graph attention network. In this way, our search engine can go beyond simple semantic matching and precisely capture and provide structured factual evidence. Our experiments on mainstream open-domain question-answering benchmark datasets show that, compared with the RAG model using vector retrieval, our GL-GraphRAG has achieved significant improvements in both factual accuracy and answer completeness, demonstrating the effectiveness of this method.
title_zh: 基于全局与局部图关联的检索增强生成
abstract_zh: 检索增强生成（RAG）通过从外部知识库中检索信息，有效缓解了大语言模型（LLMs）在知识覆盖范围和“幻觉”问题上的局限性。然而，当前RAG系统的主要性能瓶颈仍集中在检索模块。传统的检索方法（如DPR）依赖于密集向量的相似性计算，在处理需要多步推理或理解实体间复杂关系的查询时，往往只能检索到语义相关但不准确或不完整的上下文。为解决这一核心问题，本文提出了一种新型的图关联检索机制，并构建了一个增强型框架——GL-GraphRAG。该检索工具首先利用全局知识图谱进行初步候选实体召回，随后针对特定查询动态构建局部关联图，并通过查询感知的图注意力网络对知识路径进行精确重排序。由此，我们的搜索引擎能够超越简单的语义匹配，精准捕捉并提供结构化的事实证据。在主流开放域问答基准数据集上的实验结果表明，相较于采用向量检索的RAG模型，GL-GraphRAG在事实准确性与答案完整性方面均取得了显著提升，充分验证了该方法的有效性。

title: CADKR: A Context-Aware Dialog-Based Knowledge Recommendation Model for Industrial Software Systems
authors: Tian-Yu Zuo, Pan Li, Xianghui Hu, Yichuan Jiang, Kai Di
publish: IEEE Transactions on Computational Social Systems
abstract:
Industrial software systems underpin complex industrial platforms by integrating cross-disciplinary expertize and sophisticated workflows. Their inherent complexity generates substantial cognitive demands, necessitating contextual, adaptive, and personalized knowledge support aligned with dynamic tasks and evolving expertize. Conventional recommendation approaches struggle to address heterogeneous knowledge sources, dynamic user needs with intent drift, and the domain-specific semantics required in industrial software. To overcome these challenges, we propose a context-aware dialog-based knowledge recommendation (CADKR) model, powered by large language models (LLMs). CADKR fuses dynamic interaction context with domain knowledge through a novel recommendation network (RecNet), enabling robust generalization to unseen scenarios and adaptability to preference drift. For practical deployment, lightweight optimization strategies compress model size by up to 98% without compromising accuracy. A case study in a large chemical industrial park demonstrates the effectiveness of CADKR in enhancing industrial knowledge support, while application deployments in leading new energy vehicle enterprises and the world’s largest circular resource power plant have yielded an independent verification report, providing strong evidence of the proposed method’s practical value.1

The report is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/verification-report. Code and data are available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/CADKR-TCSS. To meet double-blind requirements, organization and personnel details are anonymized and will be disclosed after acceptance.
title_zh: CADKR：一种面向工业软件系统的上下文感知对话式知识推荐模型
abstract_zh:
工业软件系统通过整合多学科专业知识和复杂的工作流程，支撑着复杂的工业平台。其固有的复杂性带来了巨大的认知负担，因此亟需与动态任务和不断演化的专业能力相匹配的上下文感知、自适应且个性化的知识支持。传统的推荐方法难以应对异构知识源、用户需求随意图漂移而动态变化，以及工业软件领域特有的语义要求。为克服这些挑战，我们提出一种基于对话的上下文感知知识推荐（CADKR）模型，该模型依托大型语言模型（LLM）。CADKR通过一种新颖的推荐网络（RecNet），将动态交互上下文与领域知识深度融合，从而实现对未见场景的强大泛化能力，并具备对用户偏好漂移的适应性。在实际部署方面，轻量级优化策略可将模型规模压缩高达98%，同时保持精度不受影响。一项在大型化工园区中的案例研究证明了CADKR在提升工业知识支持方面的有效性；此外，在领先的新能源汽车企业及全球最大的循环资源电厂的应用部署中，已获得独立验证报告，充分体现了所提方法的实际应用价值。1

报告可在 https://anonymous.4open.science/r/verification-report 获取。代码与数据可在 https://anonymous.4open.science/r/CADKR-TCSS 下载。为满足双盲评审要求，组织与人员信息已匿名化处理，将在论文接受后予以披露。

title: Design and FPGA Implementation of CNN Accelerator with RISC-V for System-on-Chip
authors: Nirmal Lunagariya, Gunjan Thakur, Dev Desai, Deepak Sahu
publish: 2025 1st International Conference on Data Science and Intelligent Network Computing (ICDSINC)
abstract: This paper presents a CNN accelerator designed as a coprocessor to a RISC-V core for efficient execution of machine learning tasks on System-on-Chip (SoC) platforms. Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) are widely used in applications such as image processing and speech recognition, but their high computational demand poses challenges related to power consumption and execution time. General-purpose processors often fall short in handling these workloads efficiently. To address this, the proposed architecture offloads core CNN operations to a dedicated hardware accelerator while leveraging the flexibility and low-power benefits of the open-source RISC-V platform. The design is implemented to perform the digit recognition task in Verilog HDL and tested on an Field Programmable Gate Array (FPGA). Results show a significant reduction in number of clock cycles to execute the task compared to using the RISC-V core alone. This indicates improved efficiency and faster execution with the proposed CNN architecture and hence suitable for embedded machine learning applications.
title_zh: 面向片上系统（SoC）的基于RISC-V的CNN加速器设计与FPGA实现
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种作为RISC-V核心协处理器的卷积神经网络（CNN）加速器，旨在实现片上系统（SoC）平台上机器学习任务的高效执行。卷积神经网络广泛应用于图像处理、语音识别等场景，但其高计算需求带来了功耗和执行时间方面的挑战。通用处理器在处理此类工作负载时往往效率不足。为此，所提出的架构将核心的CNN运算操作卸载至专用硬件加速器，同时充分利用开源RISC-V平台的灵活性与低功耗优势。该设计采用Verilog HDL实现，并在现场可编程门阵列（FPGA）上进行了测试。实验结果表明，相较于仅使用RISC-V核心，完成数字识别任务所需的时钟周期数显著减少，说明所提出的CNN架构在效率和执行速度方面均有明显提升，因而非常适合嵌入式机器学习应用。
